text.text:
*345 brands total* (+0 today)
100% have complete profiles (description + image)

*:x: Broken Links (4)*

| Brand | URL | Notes |
| 1002 | qvtu.edu.cn/... | Chinese university URL — wrong domain. Recurring. |
| 7th Island | taiwan-brands.vercel.app | Vercel dev/scaffold placeholder URL |
| Mr.Casa 傅燈先生 | spstaszic.pl/... | Polish e-commerce — unrelated site. Recurring. |
| 三十這皮藝 | taiwan-brands.vercel.app | Vercel dev/scaffold placeholder URL |

*:warning: Suspicious — Wrong Threads Account (3)*

• `ENABLE` → points to *@meta.ai* Threads account (Meta AI, not the brand)
• `Nebula Scent 雲香設計` → points to *@meta.ai* Threads account (Meta AI, not the brand)
• `寶豐香皼 Baofong` → points to *@nu_dream_jewelry* (different brand's account)

*:thread: Suspicious — Third-party (72)*

• *71 Threads.com social URLs* — brands using Threads profiles/posts as `purchase_website` instead of a shop. Customers cannot purchase from these. Includes: 4 Nuts, 404 Oligo, FUMI Towel, Fumor, FuSoap, Roomix, TW Shoesmaker, YOFA, Yogasana + 62 others.
• *1 raw Shopify subdomain* — `1973 Furniture` → 1973home.myshopify.com (recurring from DEV-976)

*DB Health*
Top tables: `brands` (11 MB), `brand_ai_results` (9.2 MB), `storage.objects` (7.9 MB), `brand_search_results` (7 MB), `brand_images` (4 MB)
Connections: 1 active / 26 idle / 0 idle-in-txn — longest query ~0s :white_check_mark:
Dead tuples: :warning: 8 small tables exceed 20% threshold (brand_reports 4600%, brand_owners 3500%, brand_saves 3100%, moderation_flags 2200%, newsletter_subscribers 900%, brand_submissions 850%, profiles 242.9%, claim_requests 100%) — all low-row tables; recommend `VACUUM ANALYZE` on these. Larger tables healthy after recent VACUUMs.
Slow queries: Top queries are VACUUM ANALYZE ops (1056ms, 712ms) — maintenance only. No production query issues detected.
